reviewerRoles.notes: Runtime art is coherent enough for an all-catalog demo read-through when presented through native layered treatment. Final launch still needs commissioned art direction and approval.
All 24 complete catalog books have character bibles, per-character visual identity locks, forbidden visual elements, and manifest links from every scene entry.
Internal review approves demo use of hanji, hanbok, village, food, landscape, and folktale visual direction. External Korean reviewer signoff remains required before final publication.
Every complete scene has a planned layer breakdown, generated_reviewed runtime layer assets, and native runtime treatment. Final art-directed animation approval remains a production task.

approvalCriteria: Every complete scene has a selected non-placeholder runtime image.
Every runtime scene entry references a character bible, style bible, and production layer plan.
Prompts forbid text and watermarks and include fit-safe/cropping-safe art direction.
Character bibles include visual identity locks, forbidden visual elements, continuity notes, and do-not-change rules.
At least seven approval anchors exist for style and high-risk character calibration.
All complete scenes have planned background, midground, character, foreground, effect, and particle/glow layer roles.
iOS and Android render shared content with native layered treatment and reduced-motion support.
Generated draft assets are not represented as commissioned, final, or production approved.

notProductionClaims: Runtime scene art is generated_reviewed for internal all-catalog demo use, not commissioned_final.
Runtime cover art is generated_reviewed for internal all-catalog demo use, not commissioned_final.
Semantic story/art matching is checked mechanically and by internal agent review, but final external human creative and Korean cultural approval is still required.
Commercial production licensing/legal approval is still required before release.
